headlines.title: Trump notches more GOP primary wins, but big midterm questions remain
headlines.description: President Donald Trump flexed the strength of his party-transforming political movement again, continuing the successful process of eliminating political enemies within the GOP this month.

headlines.title: Democrats pick candidates for key districts in the battle for the House
headlines.description: Major general election matchups across the House battleground are set after Tuesday’s primaries, as the race for control of Congress takes center stage in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Josh Shapiro and Stacy Garrity prepare to face off for governor of Pennsylvania this fall
headlines.description: WARMINSTER TOWNSHIP, Pa. — Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro and state Treasurer Stacy Garrity will face off this fall in a ticket-topping race for governor in the country’s largest swing state

headlines.title: Rep. Mike Collins and Derek Dooley advance to Georgia GOP Senate runoff
headlines.description: The Republican nominee will take on Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff in November in a critical battleground race.

headlines.title: Keisha Lance Bottoms wins Democratic nomination in Georgia governor’s race
headlines.description: NBC News projects the former Atlanta mayor and Biden administration official cleared the 50% threshold needed to avoid a runoff.

headlines.title: Christine Drazan wins Oregon GOP primary for governor, setting up rematch with Democratic Gov. Tina Kotek
headlines.description: NBC News projects Drazan, a state senator, emerged from a 14-candidate field to advance to the general election in the blue state.

headlines.title: Republicans Burt Jones and Rick Jackson advance to a runoff in the Georgia governor primary, setting up a MAGA clash
headlines.description: Georgia Lt. Gov. Burt Jones and billionaire Rick Jackson will advance to a June runoff in the state’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects

headlines.title: Georgia Supreme Court justices fend off Democratic-backed challengers
headlines.description: Two Georgia Supreme Court justices won re-election on Tuesday, NBC News projects, fending off Democratic-backed challengers in the battleground state.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Rep. Barry Moore heads to a runoff in Alabama GOP Senate primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects Moore didn’t clear the 50% threshold to advance to the general election. His runoff opponent remains unclear.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Andy Barr wins GOP nomination for Mitch McConnell’s Senate seat in Kentucky
headlines.description: Rep. Andy Barr, riding an endorsement from President Donald Trump, has won the Republican primary in the race for retiring Sen.

headlines.title: Longtime Trump ally Michael Caputo files first known claim for ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: The former Department of Health and Human Services spokesperson filed the claim a day after the Justice Department set up the nearly $1.8 billion fund.

headlines.title: John Adams quote projected on DOJ building in protest of $1.8B fund
headlines.description: Opponents of a $1.776 billion taxpayer-backed “anti-weaponization” fund projected a quote from one of the Founding Fathers onto the Justice Department building in protest.
